hero.text: Believe in the magic within you.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a day filled with energy. Embrace the challenges and turn them into opportunities.
aries.love: Romantic gestures may surprise you today. Be open to new love.
aries.career: Collaboration is key at work—team up with someone to tackle a project.

taurus.general: Stability is your theme today. Focus on your personal goals and finances.
taurus.love: A stable relationship deepens today. Appreciate small moments together.
taurus.career: Your hard work is about to pay off. Prepare for recognition.

gemini.general: Communication is your superpower today. Reach out to others.
gemini.love: A heart-to-heart conversation will strengthen your relationship.
gemini.career: Brainstorm new ideas and share them. Innovation is crucial.

cancer.general: Nurturing your environment will bring you peace. Create a cozy space.
cancer.love: An emotional breakthrough in your relationship is on the horizon.
cancer.career: Focus on teamwork. Everyone's input will be valuable today.

leo.general: Confidence shines through today. Showcase your talents.
leo.love: Romance is in the air. Plan something special for your partner.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise. Step up and be heard.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will serve you well. Tackle small projects one by one.
virgo.love: Healthy communication will resolve any misunderstandings today.
virgo.career: Organize your tasks for maximum productivity.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Different aspects of your life demand attention.
libra.love: Romantic surprises could make the day more exciting.
libra.career: Networking can lead to fruitful opportunities. Connect with others.

scorpio.general: Your intensity draws others in. Use it to create impactful relationships.
scorpio.love: A deep connection with someone could bloom today.
scorpio.career: Strategic thinking will help you solve a work-related issue.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits you today. Embrace spontaneity.
sagittarius.love: Exciting experiences will rekindle the spark in your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Take the initiative and propose your ideas in the workplace.

capricorn.general: Hard work today will lead to long-term rewards. Stay focused.
capricorn.love: Invest time in your partner; it will strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: Your efforts will not go unnoticed. Prepare for recognition.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flourish today. Trust your instincts.
aquarius.love: Inspiration in love leads to exciting developments. Be open.
aquarius.career: Collaboration may yield surprising results. Engage with others.

pisces.general: Your intuition is heightened today. Listen to your instincts.
pisces.love: A romantic gesture will capture your partner's heart.
pisces.career: Creative solutions will help you navigate workplace challenges.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

professional.text: Setting goals is the first step in turning the invisible into the visible.
professional.author: Tony Robbins

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

captions.text: Today is a gift, that's why it's called the present.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Life is short; make every selfie count!
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
captions.author: Oscar Wilde

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: What we learn with pleasure, we never forget.
tech.author: Alfred Mercier

tech.text: It's not about what you look at that matters, it's about what you see.
tech.author: Henry Thoreau

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Did you hear about the claustrophobic astronaut? He just needed a little space.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
faith.author: Nelson Mandela

faith.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: With God all things are possible.
faith.author: Matthew 19:26

faith.text: Doubt is a thief that often makes us fear to tread where we might have won.
faith.author: William Shakespeare

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, we find our way.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.
wisdom.author: William Shakespeare

wisdom.text: We do not learn from experience... we learn from reflecting on experience.
wisdom.author: John Dewey
